expected_contains: Codex App -> Plugins -> Add local plugin source ->
After adding the plugin source, open a new Codex App thread in the folder you want to record.
Say: 查看工作记录状态
Expected local command: winchronicle workday intent "查看工作记录状态" --execute
If Codex starts scanning files instead, paste the record-only prompt from:
does not send raw observed text
not a telemetry or log-counter report
Technical counters belong only in the explicit technical/debugging view
Add this local plugin source path in the Codex app plugin UI or local plugin source settings
do not paste summaries into chat unless the user explicitly asks for chat output
